existing_features.title: Reposition the Time Zone button popup so it opens to the left-hand side, anchored close to the Time Zone button, instead of its current position.
Reposition the Global Control button popup so it opens to the left-hand side, anchored close to the Global Control button, instead of its current position.
Restore the Local Time display inside the Time Zone button's popup box. It should show the local time (with UTC offset) as it previously appeared before it was removed.
Re-add the Font Size control (slider or input) to the Global Control popup, placed directly below the Globe Rotation control.
